title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 7.200 - Missouri boundary commission established, members
text:
7.200.  Missouri boundary commission established, members. — There is hereby established the "Missouri Boundary Commission" consisting of the governor or his designee, the attorney general or his designee, the state land surveyor or his designee, two members of the senate appointed by the president pro tem of the senate, two members of the house of representatives appointed by the speaker of the house of representatives, and two persons from the general public appointed by the governor, with the advice and consent of the senate.  The governor or his designee shall serve as chairman of the commission and shall be responsible for calling the meetings of the commission, managing any funds appropriated to the commission, providing clerical support to the commission, and administering sections 7.200 to 7.250.
(L. 1992 S.B. 571 § 1) 
Effective 7-09-92
